notes.en: Located in Euljiro (Hipjiro), a former Go club now transformed into a unique jazz bar offering natural wines and live jazz performances. Booking for performances is handled via Instagram DM.

analyzed.name: 기원
analyzed.notes: A lo-fi jazz foundry for city girls and boys, located in Euljiro (referred to as Hipjiro). The venue, named '기원' (Giwon), carries the double meaning of 'origin' and a place for playing Go (Baduk), reflecting its past as a Go club 30 years ago. It is run by Kang Woong, a jazz record producer and musician. Giwon offers jazz music chosen by the owner's taste, primarily modern jazz played on vinyl during weekdays, paired with a curated selection of natural wines (80% of the wine list). Live performances by jazz musicians are held every Saturday, with booking exclusively available via Instagram DM. Performance schedules are announced one week in advance on Instagram, or a month in advance for those who visit in person. The owner is a record collector and also allows fellow DJs or musicians to select music.

locations.name: 기원

locations.notes: Located in Euljiro (Hipjiro), a former Go club now transformed into a unique jazz bar offering natural wines and live jazz performances. Booking for performances is handled via Instagram DM.

address_text.en: Rm 304, 14, Samil-daero 12-gil, Myeong-dong, Jung District, Seoul, South Korea

notes.ko: 을지로(힙지로)에 위치한 과거 바둑클럽이었던 곳이 내추럴 와인과 라이브 재즈 공연을 제공하는 독특한 재즈 바로 탈바꿈했습니다. 공연 예약은 인스타그램 DM을 통해서만 가능합니다.
notes.en: Located in Euljiro (Hipjiro), a former Go club now transformed into a unique jazz bar offering natural wines and live jazz performances. Booking for performances is handled via Instagram DM.

notes.ko: 을지로(힙지로로 불림)에 위치한 도시 남녀를 위한 로파이 재즈 공간. '기원'이라는 이름은 '기원(origin)'과 30년 전 바둑클럽이었던 과거를 반영하여 바둑을 두는 장소라는 이중적인 의미를 지닌다. 재즈 음반 제작자이자 음악가인 강웅이 운영한다. 기원은 주인의 취향에 따라 선별된 재즈 음악을 제공하며, 주중에는 주로 바이닐로 모던 재즈를 틀고 엄선된 내추럴 와인(와인 리스트의 80%)을 함께 제공한다. 재즈 음악가들의 라이브 공연은 매주 토요일에 열리며, 예약은 인스타그램 DM을 통해서만 가능하다. 공연 일정은 인스타그램에 일주일 전 공지되거나, 직접 방문하는 경우 한 달 전에 공지된다. 주인은 음반 수집가이며 다른 DJ나 음악가들도 음악을 선곡할 수 있도록 허용한다.
notes.en: A lo-fi jazz foundry for city girls and boys, located in Euljiro (referred to as Hipjiro). The venue, named '기원' (Giwon), carries the double meaning of 'origin' and a place for playing Go (Baduk), reflecting its past as a Go club 30 years ago. It is run by Kang Woong, a jazz record producer and musician. Giwon offers jazz music chosen by the owner's taste, primarily modern jazz played on vinyl during weekdays, paired with a curated selection of natural wines (80% of the wine list). Live performances by jazz musicians are held every Saturday, with booking exclusively available via Instagram DM. Performance schedules are announced one week in advance on Instagram, or a month in advance for those who visit in person. The owner is a record collector and also allows fellow DJs or musicians to select music.

notes.ko: Walk-in Available. 예약금은 매장 방문 시 환불 처리됩니다. 예약 손님은 입장 순으로 원하는 자리에 착석 가능하며, 예약 시간보다 빠른 입장 가능합니다. 예약 시간보다 늦어질 경우 노쇼 처리가 되지 않도록 인스타그램 DM으로 사전 연락 필요. 주차 공간이 따로 없으며, 인스타그램 스토리 하이라이트에서 가깝고 저렴한 주차 공간 정보를 확인 가능합니다. Catchtable 예약 링크: https://catchtable.co.kr/DIdo
notes.en: Walk-ins available. The reservation deposit will be refunded upon visiting the store. Reserved guests can choose their seats on a first-come, first-served basis and can enter earlier than the reservation time. If you expect to be late, please contact via Instagram DM in advance to avoid a no-show. There is no separate parking space; information about nearby and affordable parking can be found in the Instagram story highlights. Catchtable booking link: https://catchtable.co.kr/DIdo

food_policy.ko: 테이블 당 음식 1개 이상 / 개인 1주류 주문 필수 (하우스와인 및 맥주 주문 시 해당, 보틀 주문 시 제외), 1인당 공연관람비 12,000원
food_policy.en: Minimum 1 food item per table / 1 drink order per person required (applies to house wine and beer orders, excluded for bottle orders). Performance viewing fee of ₩12,000 per person.
